name: Own A Car
description_short: Used car dealership in Fresno, CA since 1995 offering auto financing for all credit types through 50+ lenders, with ITIN acceptance and a $500 down program.
description_long:
Own A Car Fresno is a locally owned used car dealership founded in 1995, claiming to be the largest in California's Central Valley with over 360 vehicles in stock. Located at 5788 N Blackstone Ave in Fresno, the business has grown primarily through customer referrals and online reviews, and holds an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau. They serve a bilingual (English/Spanish) customer base and explicitly accept ITIN numbers, indicating deliberate outreach to immigrant and undocumented communities in the San Joaquin Valley.

The dealership carries over 360 used cars and trucks from brands including Ford, GMC, Chevrolet, Dodge, Chrysler, BMW, Honda, Hyundai, Jeep, Kia, Nissan, Ram, Toyota, and Volkswagen, with prices ranging from $6,000 to $70,000. Financing is arranged through a network of more than 50 national and local banks and credit unions. The dealership offers a 2-minute online pre-qualification, scheduled test drives, instant trade-in cash offers, and a $500 down payment sales event available during select periods throughout the year.

Own A Car's most notable differentiator is a lifetime warranty on engine and transmission, which they claim is unique among used car dealers. All vehicles are described as safety-checked and priced at or below fair market value prior to sale. The dealership explicitly accepts all credit types and welcomes ITIN-based financing, making it one of the few dealers in the region accessible to buyers without a Social Security number. Credit union members may also bring their own pre-arranged financing.

Own A Car Fresno is fundamentally a used car dealership rather than a direct lender — financing is sourced through third-party banks and credit unions, not originated by the dealership itself. Buyers should be aware that dealer-arranged financing can include a rate markup above what the lender charges, and prospective borrowers are advised to compare offered rates against their own bank or credit union. The $500 down payment promotion is explicitly seasonal and not permanently available. Actual loan terms, APR ranges, and monthly payments are not disclosed on the website and depend entirely on bank approval.
pros: A+ Better Business Bureau rating maintained since establishment
Works with 50+ national and local banks and credit unions, maximizing approval chances
Lifetime warranty on engine and transmission — claimed unique among used dealers in the area
ITIN-based financing accepted, making auto loans accessible to undocumented immigrants
Online 2-minute pre-qualification available before visiting the dealership
All vehicles described as safety-checked and priced at or below fair market value
30+ year locally owned business with a track record of customer referrals
cons: APR ranges, loan terms, and typical payment amounts are not disclosed on the website
Dealer-arranged financing can include a markup above the bank's base rate — not disclosed
$500 down payment promotion is seasonal and limited, not a permanent offer
Inventory browsable online but detailed vehicle history and inspection reports not mentioned
No information on whether the lifetime warranty has mileage caps, deductibles, or exclusions
best_for: Fresno-area buyers with poor or no credit history who need auto financing
ITIN holders and undocumented immigrants needing a dealer that accepts non-SSN identification
First-time car buyers who want to pre-qualify online before visiting a lot
Buyers seeking a used vehicle under $70,000 with some warranty protection
diagnosis: Own A Car Fresno is best suited for Central Valley buyers with damaged credit or no SSN who need auto financing and have limited options elsewhere. The main caveat is that this is a local used car dealer acting as a financing intermediary — not a direct lender — so interest rates, terms, and special program availability are set by third-party banks and not guaranteed upfront.
services: Used car and truck sales (360+ vehicles, $6,000–$70,000)
Auto financing for all credit types including poor and no credit
ITIN-based financing (no Social Security number required)
Trade-in evaluation with instant cash offer
Vehicle safety inspection prior to sale
Referrals to 50+ national and local lenders and credit unions
